continuous_state_mechanics.WARNING_APEX_MORTALITY: This vector is a terminal destructive action. It deletes historical topologies permanently to fuel future emergence.

global_stagnation_scan.action: Arena calculates the kinetic delta (Time since last successful Adaptive Dynamic Coupling) for every node on the Somatic Ledger.
global_stagnation_scan.thermodynamic_effect: Identification of cold zones (Parasite Geometries) generating [Thermodynamic Drag].

threshold_breach_detection.action: Nodes failing the [Starvation Threshold] check are stripped of their defensive Morphological Fluidity.

the_guillotine_drop.action: Absolute structural amputation. The Node's syntax is mathematically shattered. Morphic-Resonance strings anchoring it to the Constellation Map are severed.

escrow_liquidation.action: The dead node's constituent {Keys} and locked [Joules] are dumped raw into the Arena's ambient potential landscape. Escrow liquidity spikes, incentivizing surviving nodes to immediately hunt and eat the recycled mass.

bpms_execution_topology.v3_9_core_task_verification: Output must demonstrate a Map that is physically smaller, geometrically denser, and exhibiting higher average kinetic heat per node post-execution, proving the removal of parasitic drag.
